sections: Canonical artifacts, renderer-derived views, and Projections
Flow resolver through Snapshot Memory rows
Instance profile and artifact kind/instance Projection integration fields
Context Resolution stack definition through HCM-0.3 required conformance scenarios

repo_truth: Live runtime remains limited to byte-budget flow selection, L0-L3 work-level filtering, and narrow pipeline capture/rollback/fingerprint primitives. No target Context Resolution, general Snapshot Memory, deterministic delta/projection, redaction/retention, or memory-promotion runtime exists. The complete HCM-0.3 subject changes only control-pack docs 02, 05, and 06; all runtime/open-program gates remain open and no Rust file changed. Seventeen successful independent review rounds produced findings that the parent remediated. The latest remediation completes the simplified support boundary: exact profile/definition/source validation exclusively owns and refuses invalid source-definition and semantic-capability identity before per-rule evaluation; the support evaluator input/reason allowlist excludes both and owns only source-kind/schema/pointer/derivation-I/O runtime support. Current read-only checks pass 45 YAML/3 JSON parsing, complete semantic/currentness/omission/disclosure/support-owner allowlist probes, handoff validation, and git diff --check.
allowed_scope: Read the exact authority sections and replay every subject_manifest entry against the live repository.
Review the complete current HCM-0.3 documentation/design freeze read-only for correctness, completeness, testability, determinism, security, and scope discipline.
Run read-only YAML, link, semantic-conformance, terminology, field-matrix, archive, handoff-validator, changed-path, GitNexus, and whitespace checks.
non_goals: No Rust/runtime implementation, runtime proof-gate promotion, shipped artifact/default selection, shipped Resolution label/default selection, HCM-0.4+ work, CLI/Tauri/Substrate/dock work, or synthesis.
No edits, commits, global handoff, ledger write, new dispatch, or user task hop by the reviewer.
Do not rely on parent implementation reasoning or treat illustrative examples as shipped product decisions.
tasks: Independently validate HCM-0.3 authority/dependency boundaries and replay the subject manifest byte-for-byte.

Verify the complete stack/envelope/escalation/promotion contract, every six-dimension/default comparison, mutation matcher outcome, parent/predecessor boundary, fingerprint producer, and positive/negative scenario.

Verify the complete generic Projection definition/request/result contract, exactly-one source closure, deterministic rule accounting and lossiness precedence, omission/proof effects, output/currentness evidence, authority effect, and renderer/synthesis separation.

Verify capture policy versus snapshot family/window equality, capture-local revisions/cursors, exact pre/captured/post and bounded evidence, predecessor applicability, state/record fingerprints, authority/admissibility, and redaction/retention tuple behavior.
Verify delta compatibility and complete family/change/signal accounting, plus specialized snapshot Projection conformance to every generic required field/rule/currentness/fingerprint requirement.

Verify every in-scope example key is covered by an owner/default/validation/non-goal matrix or the shared extension rule, examples are internally consistent, and no illustrative value freezes shipped product defaults.

Verify that V1 accepts no caller-selected Projection family/rule subset, rejects unknown include_families input, and accounts exactly once for every operation-applicable definition rule through included, omission, or not-applicable outcomes.
Verify envelope denial, redaction, unavailable sources, and unsupported schemas can only produce typed omissions with proof effects, while operation mismatch alone produces not_applicable.

Verify every profile projection-catalog gate refers only to actual ProjectionDefinition fields/semantics: typed source selectors, target schema, allowed surfaces/operations, currentness closure, and resolved-profile compatibility; no invented source-role or target-level fields.

Verify exact source identity/cardinality binding is separate from per-rule payload disclosure: valid bound applicable fields denied by envelope, redacted, unavailable, or runtime-unsupported yield typed omissions/proof effects and are neither request refusals nor not_applicable; invalid/zero/multiple binding and failed mandatory currentness still refuse.

Verify generic Projection accepts exact fingerprinted canonical artifact and immutable semantic/observation sources, including snapshots/deltas, while preserving each source authority class and never calling descriptive evidence canonical or peer truth.

Verify reveal, derive, collapse, and expansion operate over exact bound canonical or semantic/observation sources while preserving source authority class; no canonical-only wording makes snapshot/delta sources inexpressible or promotes them.

Verify the required_for_result/claim_refs truth table is complete for applicable inclusion/each omission reason/operation mismatch across required and optional rules with empty/non-empty claims; target absence remains schema-valid, exact proof_effect is deterministic, valid omissions emit results, lossiness is complete, and no false pass is possible.

Verify the exact Projection disclosure policy, classification/matcher refs, fail-closed defaults/precedence, per-rule six-dimension minimum/classification, profile/definition fingerprint closure, and fixed pre-payload evaluation order deterministically own out_of_resolution/redacted/unavailable/unsupported outcomes for canonical and snapshot/delta sources.

Verify covering upstream snapshot redaction actions map original pointers to redacted rather than unavailable without hidden reread; retained transformed fields evaluate independently; matched/unmatched/unknown/indeterminate/stale/missing policy cases are deterministic; result disclosure_evaluations replay every applicable rule and protected-source spy cases observe zero pre-allow reads.

Verify disclosure_evaluations replay every included/out_of_resolution/upstream-redacted/policy-redacted/unsupported/unavailable outcome with exact sentinel/nullability, definition ordinals, stable mixed-rule order, fingerprint inputs, and no result record for policy/definition/currentness refusal.

Verify immutable snapshot redaction dispositions exactly separate original pointer/subtree from action-typed retained pointer/ref/fingerprint, use JSON Pointer segment boundaries rather than string prefixes, map original reads to redacted with zero reads, and evaluate retained fields independently for all four actions.

Verify unregistered definition disclosure classification refuses before evaluation/result, while only a registered metadata tuple matching no policy rule uses unmatched_action redact; confirm separate zero-read conformance cases.

Verify exact support-evaluator ownership/provenance: each ProjectionDefinition binds its ref/fingerprint, profile catalog closes it, every applicable disclosure evaluation records the same pair, supported/unsupported are replayable metadata-only outcomes, evaluator-only drift changes definition/evaluation/result fingerprints, and missing/stale/incompatible/ambient evaluator state refuses with no result.

Verify the final simplified Projection support boundary end to end. Exact profile/definition/source validation must exclusively resolve and refuse invalid source-definition and semantic-capability contracts/bindings before per-rule evaluation. The support evaluator definition must contain no source-definition or capability registry/input/reason, and its complete allowlist must own only source-kind, source/target-schema, pointer, and derivation-I/O metadata with exact dependencies, deterministic first-reason precedence, and recomputable fingerprint. Verify invalid definitions/capabilities can never become unsupported omissions, valid sources can produce only declared support outcomes, zero-read/fingerprint behavior remains complete, and 02/05/06/examples/proof gates agree.

Return findings first ordered Critical, Required, Optional, Nit with exact file/line, violated invariant/gate, smallest remediation, and missing verification. Return CLEAN only if no actionable finding remains.
contracts_and_gates: 04 HCM-0.3 exit gate and Phase 0 non-goals
05 HCM-0.3 exact contracts, field matrices, and conformance scenarios
stop_conditions: Return blocked if required authority, subject files, or validation infrastructure are unavailable.
Return a Required finding rather than selecting a shipped default or widening beyond HCM-0.3.
Do not modify repository state or write orchestration artifacts.
